sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found in sources

special_mechanics.name: Chain Swinging
special_mechanics.description: Porky can swing on chains throughout levels

special_mechanics.name: Bubble Riding
special_mechanics.description: Porky can ride bubbles exhaled by special sea creatures underwater, providing vertical and lateral movement

special_mechanics.name: Potion Float Mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Collecting potion power-up inflates Porky for limited time, allowing him to float and move freely in all directions (up, down, left, right)

special_mechanics.name: Daffy Duck Bounce
special_mechanics.description: Standing on certain platforms causes vampire-costumed Daffy Duck to appear, scaring Porky and propelling him upward to reach high places

special_mechanics.name: Door Entry
special_mechanics.description: Porky can enter doorways to transition between areas

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Sources contain level design and gameplay feature descriptions but no quantitative physics parameters (velocity, acceleration, gravity values). Game features diverse movement mechanics including chains, climbing, bubble riding, and a float power-up system. Developer was Phoenix Interactive Entertainment with Joe Booth as director/programmer.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Porky Pig's Haunted Holiday
